data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: WhatsApp offers two-factor authentication for an additional layer of security.
data.technical_spec: Users can enable 2FA by setting a six-digit passcode required when registering their phone number with WhatsApp again.

data.title: Spam Detection Algorithms
data.description: Advanced algorithms detect and limit the spread of spam and misinformation.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models analyze message patterns and content to identify potential spam.

data.title: Account Protection Mechanism
data.description: Security checks are in place to prevent unauthorized account access.
data.technical_spec: Verification processes such as code sent via SMS confirm users' identities.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine security audits help identify vulnerabilities and reinforce security measures.
data.technical_spec: Third-party audits are conducted to ensure adherence to the latest security standards.

data.title: Privacy Protection Policy
data.description: Strict privacy policies protect users' data from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Data collected is used according to predefined privacy rules compliant with global standards.
